scripts.lint: bun --filter cleanuparr lint && bun --filter filtarr lint
scripts.lint:fix: bun --filter cleanuparr lint:fix && bun --filter filtarr lint:fix
scripts.fmt: bun --filter cleanuparr fmt && bun --filter filtarr fmt
scripts.fmt:check: bun --filter cleanuparr fmt:check && bun --filter filtarr fmt:check
